name: humanspec_PMS2_para_chimpanzee
description: Human-specific duplicon contrast: PMS2_para. Status in Pan troglodytes: 'ape_shared_duplicon'. In human (GRCh38) the locus sits on chr7:~6.1 Mb; in this ape the syntenic region is approximated on chr7. Used by LLmap to refuse silent absorption of human-vs-ape divergence when mapping cross-species reads.

architecture.internal_structure: Reference contrast for PMS2_para. See Dennis 2012, Suntsova 2017, T2T-ape 2024 for duplicon-by-duplicon presence calls.

related_diseases: human-specific cortex expansion / neurodevelopmental dosage (e.g. PMS2_para)
